title: H.265 decode failure on WebView 92-94
action: Enable remote config flag video.codec_fallback=h264 for the account or fleet. Permanent fix requires OEM WebView OTA to 95+. Do not advise reinstalling the app.

title: EU consent flow v2 missing or stale consent state
action: Settings > Privacy > Reset consent, then relaunch the app; consent flow v2 appears on next playback attempt. If the consent screen itself fails to load, collect logs and escalate S3.

title: HU-7 clock skew after battery disconnect breaks QR pairing
action: Enable Settings > System > Automatic time (NTP), reboot the head unit, retry pairing. Verify head-unit clock against phone clock.

title: AuroraOS 3.2 split-screen crash during video playback
symptoms: screen goes blank when splitting display
action: No workaround. Set expectations: fix ships in app 2.8. Do not suggest settings changes; they do not help.

title: Vehicle provisioning region does not match account region
symptoms: service not available in your region after vehicle import
worked in old country, blocked after moving
action: Backend region reset required; triage has no write access to provisioning records. Escalate S2 with VIN region, account region, and account ID. Never advise creating a new account.

title: HU-9 audio/video desync after cellular handoff
symptoms: audio ahead of video while driving
action: No user-side fix; do not promise one. Collect playback log bundle (Settings > About > Export logs) and escalate S3 to the owning team.

title: Fleet channel authorization key expired
symptoms: authorization required on all fleet vehicles
entire fleet logged out at once
action: Self-service: fleet admin portal > Admin > Contracts > Renew. Triage can send the renewal guide but cannot renew on the customer's behalf. If vehicles are still logged out 24h after renewal, escalate S2.

title: RTL subtitle languages (Arabic, Hebrew) not supported
action: Known limitation on the roadmap; no ETA committed. Do not promise a date.
